opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every joint in my body is aching, my heart races wildly if I sit up, and the exhaustion is completely paralyzing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared over the last day - I can't sit up without my heart racing and my vision graying out, and every joint hurts.

symptom_narrative.character: diffuse joint/myofascial pain, racing heart and gray-out vision on sitting up, paralysing fatigue
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't walk to the bathroom without vision graying out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all joints ache; racing heart and dizziness when upright
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: chronic fatigue and diffuse pain; near blackout on standing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have hEDS with POTS and get these structurally-driven flares

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: hypermobile Ehlers-Danlos syndrome with secondary POTS

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and moved my mattress to the floor to prevent falls

communication_style.typical_message_style: clear, describes the combined joint and orthostatic symptoms

objective_data_offered.value: around 115/75 lying and ~95/65 standing on my home cuff
my joints are bendy and sore but nothing looks dislocated/deformed
